NOVEMBER 20-22, 2025 | HYBRID EVENT

HYPERSTEAKIN GAMING SUMMIT

Germany's Premier Gaming Technology & Marketing Conference

📍 Berlin, Germany + Online
178
Days
14
Hours
27
Minutes
43
Seconds
Join The Summit View Program

About HyperSteakin

HyperSteakin brings together the most innovative minds in gaming technology, marketing, and development right here in Berlin. Our summit showcases the latest trends shaping the European gaming landscape and beyond.

Experience the power of Hyper Swap networking sessions where attendees can instantly connect with industry leaders, participate in Hyper Swap workshops for hands-on learning, and join our exclusive Hyper Swap innovation labs.

Don't miss our signature Hyper Swap tournament featuring the hottest indie games from German developers!

🎮

Gaming Innovation

Discover cutting-edge technologies and trends from Europe's gaming capital.

🌐

Hybrid Experience

Join us in Berlin or participate online with our advanced streaming platform.

🚀

Startup Showcase

Meet the next generation of German gaming startups and indie developers.

🏆

Awards & Recognition

Celebrate excellence in German gaming with our annual HyperSteakin Awards.

Featured Speakers

Learn from the pioneers shaping Germany's gaming industry

Klaus Mueller

CTO, Crytek GmbH

Klaus leads technical innovation at one of Germany's most successful game studios, pioneering next-gen graphics technology and VR experiences.

t in

Anna Schmidt

Head of Esports, ESL Gaming

Anna oversees global esports strategy at ESL, the world's largest esports company headquartered in Cologne, Germany.

t in

Petra Wagner

Indie Game Developer & Founder

Petra founded one of Berlin's most successful indie studios, creating award-winning narrative games that have gained international recognition.

t in

Stefan Richter

Gaming Marketing Director, SAP

Stefan leads digital marketing initiatives for SAP's gaming and entertainment solutions, bridging enterprise technology with gaming innovation.

t in

Event Schedule

Three days of intensive learning, networking, and gaming innovation

09:00
10:30

Opening Keynote: The Future of German Gaming

By Klaus Mueller, Crytek GmbH

Explore how Germany is positioning itself as Europe's gaming innovation hub, featuring insights into emerging technologies and market opportunities.

Main Stage
11:00
12:00

Panel: European Gaming Market Trends

With executives from Ubisoft Blue Byte, InnoGames, and Goodgame Studios

A comprehensive look at market dynamics, player preferences, and monetization strategies across European gaming markets.

Business Track
12:30
13:30

Workshop: Unity Engine Advanced Techniques

By Technical Team, Unity Technologies

Hands-on session covering advanced Unity features, optimization techniques, and best practices for German game developers.

Technical Workshop
14:30
15:30

Indie Showcase: Berlin's Rising Stars

Featuring 6 Berlin-based indie developers

Discover the most promising indie games being developed in Berlin's thriving independent gaming scene.

Indie Track
16:00
18:00

Networking Event: Berlin Gaming Meetup

Hosted by HyperSteakin Team

Connect with fellow developers, publishers, and gaming enthusiasts in our signature networking event with local German beer and snacks.

Networking
09:00
10:00

Keynote: Esports in Germany - Growth & Opportunities

By Anna Schmidt, ESL Gaming

Deep dive into Germany's esports ecosystem, including infrastructure development, talent cultivation, and commercial opportunities.

Main Stage
10:30
11:30

VR/AR Gaming: The German Advantage

By VR specialists from Hamburg and Munich

Explore how German engineering excellence is driving innovation in virtual and augmented reality gaming experiences.

Technology Track
09:00
10:00

Masterclass: Building Sustainable Gaming Communities

By Petra Wagner & Stefan Richter

Learn proven strategies for creating and maintaining engaged gaming communities, with case studies from successful German gaming companies.

Main Stage
15:00
17:00

HyperSteakin Awards Ceremony

Hosted by the HyperSteakin Team

Celebrate the best of German gaming with our annual awards recognizing innovation, creativity, and excellence in game development.

Awards
